name: Of Ships & Scoundrels
short_description: Of Ships & Scoundrels takes you on a journey to unknown lands that wait to be explored and conquered. As the commander of your fleet, you have to steer your battleships through a beautiful scenery of little islands, fight against enemies, friends - and forge dubious alliances.
detailed_description:
IMPORTANT NOTICE

This game will be permanently removed from the Steam Store on October 6th, 2025. The multiplayer servers are expected to remain online until Summer 2026. If you already own the game, you can keep playing it from your library. For more details, please read our full announcement.


About the Game



Of Ships & Scoundrels takes you on a journey to unknown lands that wait to be explored and conquered. As the commander of your fleet, you have to steer your battleships through a beautiful scenery of little islands, fight against enemies and so-called friends - and sometimes also forge dubious alliances. On this journey, no adventure is like the other, because all the islands are procedurally generated.

Of Ships & Scoundrels is a unique combination of realtime strategy and action game that can be enjoyed alone or together in online multiplayer.




  • Procedural islands in a Caribbean setting with nearly endless variation.
  • Day/night-cycle and dynamic weather system.
  • Unique combination of action and realtime strategy.
  • Online multiplayer for up to four players.
  • Expand your fleet and build an empire of harbors.
  • Level up Ships and harbors to strengthen your power.
  • Ships and harbors can be customized to suit your play style.

English*, German
*languages with full audio support
